assertions.reason: The 8 targeted back-navigation links now use `text-primary`, and the remaining `text-documenso-700` matches are all outside the asserted back-nav scope.
evidence: rg -n "text-primary" on the 8 targeted files found current matches at document-edit-skeleton.tsx:10, documents.$id._index.tsx:106, documents.$id.legacy_editor.tsx:87, documents.$id.logs.tsx:137, templates.$id._index.tsx:117, templates.$id.legacy_editor.tsx:64, sign.$token+/_index.tsx:376/385/476/485, and sign.$token+/complete.tsx:182.

rg -n "text-documenso-700" across the repo found matches only in packages/email/templates/reset-password.tsx:75, packages/email/template-components/template-document-self-signed.tsx:52, apps/remix/app/routes/_unauthenticated+/signin.tsx:111, apps/remix/app/components/dialogs/team-member-create-dialog.tsx:200 and :329, apps/remix/app/components/general/document-signing/document-signing-disclosure.tsx:26, and apps/remix/app/components/forms/signup.tsx:385/:408/:416.
git show --stat --oneline 62d0fd15a lists the 8 back-nav files in the brand-token replacement commit.

assertions.reason: The sign-in submit button no longer applies any `dark:bg-documenso dark:hover:opacity-90` override and therefore relies on the semantic primary styling.
evidence: git diff main --unified=0 -- apps/remix/app/components/forms/signin.tsx shows removal of `className="dark:bg-documenso dark:hover:opacity-90"`.

assertions.reason: Both inserted-field states now use `bg-primary/20`, and `bg-documenso-200` remains only in the preserved stack-avatar file outside this assertion's scope.
evidence: rg -n "bg-documenso-200" across the repo found only apps/remix/app/components/general/stack-avatar.tsx:39, and direct Grep checks in both scoped files returned no matches.
git diff main --unified=0 on the two scoped files shows `bg-documenso-200` replaced with `bg-primary/20`.

frictions.description: Route file paths containing `$teamUrl`, `$id`, and `$token` needed shell quoting during targeted `rg` inspection.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran the search with single-quoted absolute paths so the shell would not expand route-parameter segments.
